description.overview: One of the oldest pointing breeds, the Bracco Italiano is an elegant, athletic dog with a gentle disposition. They're affectionate family members and capable hunters.
description.history: The Bracco Italiano originated in Italy.
description.temperament: Known for being affectionate, intelligent, docile.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their short, dense, glossy coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: One of the oldest pointing breeds, the Bracco Italiano is an elegant, athletic dog with a gentle disposition. They're affectionate family members and capable hunters.
